Inventory Management System & POS Software

Smart POS software for retail with real-time inventory tracking, barcode scanning, and sales analytics. Built for modern retail businesses.

Request DemoSee How It Works

The Challenges

Common problems that businesses face without the right tools.

⚠️

Slow Billing Process

Manual billing leads to long queues, errors in pricing, and poor customer experience.

⚠️

Stock Mismanagement

Without real-time tracking, businesses face stockouts, overstocking, and inventory shrinkage.

⚠️

No Purchase Visibility

Managing suppliers, purchase orders, and payment tracking across spreadsheets is chaotic.

⚠️

Missing Business Insights

Without proper reporting, business owners cannot identify top products, slow movers, or profit margins.

Sell Smarter, Stock Better

DoonPortal Inventory POS System combines fast billing with intelligent inventory management. Scan barcodes, process sales instantly, track every item in real-time, and get actionable reports to grow your business.

Features

🧾

POS Billing

Fast, accurate billing with barcode scanning, multiple payment modes, and customizable invoices.

📦

Inventory Tracking

Real-time stock levels, batch tracking, expiry management, and multi-location support.

🛒

Purchase Management

Purchase orders, goods receipt, supplier invoices, and payment tracking in one place.

🤝

Supplier Management

Supplier profiles, contact details, payment history, and performance tracking.

📷

Barcode Scanning

Generate and scan barcodes for quick product lookup, billing, and stock counting.

⚠️

Stock Alerts

Automated low-stock and expiry alerts to prevent stockouts and waste.

👥

Customer Records

Customer profiles, purchase history, loyalty tracking, and credit management.

📊

Sales Reports

Daily, weekly, and monthly sales reports with profit analysis, top products, and trend charts.

Product Screenshots

Key Benefits

✅

Faster Checkout

Barcode scanning and quick billing reduce checkout time by up to 70%.

✅

Never Run Out of Stock

Automated alerts and reorder points ensure you always have what customers need.

✅

Increase Profit Margins

Detailed reports help identify top sellers, slow movers, and optimize pricing.

✅

Scale with Confidence

Multi-location support and cloud access let you grow without limits.

How It Works

Get your retail inventory software up and running quickly.

1

Book a Demo

See the POS software for retail in action with a personalized walkthrough.

2

Import Your Catalog

We help you import products, set up barcode scanning, and configure pricing.

3

Start Selling

Begin billing, tracking inventory, and generating reports from day one.
